zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Leete於1525年5月1日出生在英國坎布利其爾艾福斯達時，他的父親John Joseph Leete of Eversden25歲，母親Helen Burgoyne25歲。他於1573年4月6日與Alice Grundy在英國坎布利其爾格亞特 艾福斯達結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1597年2月17日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾艾福斯達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Leete于1525年5月1日出生在英国坎布利其爾艾福斯達时，他的父亲John Joseph Leete of Eversden25岁，母亲Helen Burgoyne25岁。他于1573年4月6日与Alice Grundy在英国坎布利其爾格亞特 艾福斯達结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1597年2月17日在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾艾福斯達。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Leete was born on 1 May 1525, in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, John Joseph Leete of Eversden, was 25 and his mother, Helen Burgoyne, was 25. He married Alice Grundy on 6 April 1573, in Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 17 February 1597, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Leete est né le 1 mai 1525, à Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Joseph Leete of Eversden, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Helen Burgoyne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Grundy le 6 avril 1573, à Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1597, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Leete am 1. Mai 1525 in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Joseph Leete of Eversden 25 und seine Mutter Helen Burgoyne 25. Er hat am 6. April 1573 in Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England Alice Grundy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1597 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Leete è nato il il 1 maggio 1525 nel Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, John Joseph Leete of Eversden, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Helen Burgoyne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Grundy il 6 aprile 1573, nel Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1597, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエバースデン
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Leeteが1525年5月1日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエバースデンで生まれた時，父John Joseph Leete of Eversdenは25歳，母Helen Burgoyneは25歳であった。1573年4月6日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアグレアト エバースデンでAlice Grundyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1597年2月17日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエバースデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Leete(이)가 1525년 5월 1일 영국 캄브리지실르 에버즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Joseph Leete of Eversden(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Burgoyne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1573년 4월 6일 영국 캄브리지실르 그리트 에버즈든에서 Alice Grundy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1597년 2월 17일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 에버즈든에 묻혔다.

pt.1 May 1525–17 February 1597: 1 de maio de 1525–17 de fevereiro de 1597
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Leete nasceu em 1 de maio de 1525, em Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Joseph Leete of Eversden, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Helen Burgoyne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Grundy em 6 de abril de 1573, em Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1597, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Leete родился 1 мая 1525 г. в местности эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Joseph Leete of Eversden было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Burgoyne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Grundy 6 апреля 1573 г. в местности грит эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 17 февраля 1597 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.1 May 1525–17 February 1597: 1 de mayo de 1525–17 de febrero de 1597
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Leete nació el 1 de mayo de 1525, en Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Joseph Leete of Eversden, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Helen Burgoyne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice Grundy el 6 de abril de 1573, en Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1597, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
